message:
feat(notifications): add frontend hooks and comprehensive tests (flywheel_gateway-59c)

- Add useNotifications.ts with complete frontend hook implementation:
  - useNotifications: Query notifications with filtering and pagination
  - useUnreadCount: Track unread notification count
  - useNotificationPreferences: Fetch and manage user preferences
  - useMarkAsRead, useMarkAllAsRead: Mark notifications as read
  - useExecuteAction: Execute notification actions
  - useUpdatePreferences: Update notification settings
  - useSendTestNotification: Send test notifications
  - useNotificationSubscription: WebSocket real-time updates
  - Utility functions for priority colors, category icons, time formatting
  - Full mock data support for development

- Add comprehensive notification service tests:
  - Category preference routing tests
  - Quiet hours bypass logic tests
  - Force channels override tests
  - Event listener subscription tests
  - Filtering by category, priority, status, date range
  - Pagination and cursor-based navigation
  - Mark as read functionality tests
  - Unread count tracking tests
  - Preferences merge and update tests
  - Storage limits enforcement tests

All 51 tests pass across 2 test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
